title: Romin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Romin |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Romintine sector/Legends|Romintine sector]] |system=[[Romin system/Legends|Romin system]] |coordinates=Q-8 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora=*[[Cloudflower]] *[[Squeeterfly]] |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Romin (species)|Romins]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Eliior]] {{C|[[Capital/Legends|capital]]}} |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Welcome to my world ... So, what do you think of my Romin so far?"
"Amazing! ... Incredible! We're overcome!"
"I am seeing that this is true by your faces! We Romins are so proud of our world that we are not surprised when visitors decide they must live here. On behalf of all Romins, I welcome you!|Romin dictator Roy Teda and Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi, in his guise as the con man and "dandy" Roper Slam|''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]''}} '''Romin''' was a small [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Romin (species)|Romins]]. ==History== Romin was a haven for criminals and villains until the tyrant [[Roy Teda]] was deposed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]. Roy Teda divided the impoverished planet into two parts, with the poor being shut out from [[Eliior]], Romin's wealthy [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city, by [[Cloudflower Wall|massive walls]]. He opened up the banks and borders of the planet to criminals, from whom he accepted bribes for their admittance, to personally enrich himself. Eventually, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] along with [[Ferus Olin]], [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] aided the [[Citizens' Resistance|citizens' revolution]] that overthrew Roy Teda. They also foiled evil [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]'s plans after arriving on the planet dressed as the notorious thieves of the recently captured [[Slams|Slam gang]]. The planet was also home to the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] twins [[Eldewn Sarvool|Eldewn]] and [[Elsae Sarvool]]. At age 9, they were orphaned when their parents were killed in an assassination ordered by a local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. Due to their Force-sensitivity, they were scheduled to relocate to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but ended up back on Romin when their transport was targeted by the gangster. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' *''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Romin}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/BP7Eldewn|series=Bounty Postings|text=7: Eldewn and Elsae Sarvool, Twin Runaways}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Romin }} [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Romintine sector locations]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Plants of Romin]] }}
